get.summary: Fetch the list of medication settings for a given branch_id
Fetch a list of medication settings for given branch_id and type
Fetch a medication setting by branch_id, type and name

ingredient_strength_unit.description: Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_unit_setting?is_ingredient_strength=true"

dosage_unit.description: Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_unit_setting?is_dosage_quantity=true"

dosage_form.description: Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_unit_setting?is_dosage_form=true"

drug_family.description: Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_drug_family_setting"

route.description: Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_medication_route_setting"

administration_type.description: Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_administration_type_setting

prn_reason.description: Its only accepted when prn_as_needed is true

types.description: Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_medication_type_setting

frequency_setting.description: Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_frequency_setting"

administration_site_details.description: Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_administration_site_details_setting"

weekdays.example: MO, TU, WE, TH, FR, SA, SU

strict.description: If true, each timing must contain the expected interval of hours between each other.

infusion_fluid_section.description: Defines validation of infusion fluid section

pre_infusion_flush_section.description: Defines validation of pre infusion flush section

post_infusion_flush_section.description: Defines validation of post infusion flush section

basal_rate_section.description: Defines validation of basal rate section

admin_primary_section.description: Defines whether primary section is available in administration or not

admin_pca_section.description: Defines whether pca section is available in administration or not

admin_insulin_section.description: Defines whether insulin section is available in administration or not

admin_bolus_section.description: Defines whether bolus section is available in administration or not

count.description: Number of items in the response

client_id.name: client_id
client_id.description: Client id to fetch the medications from

include.name: include
include.description: Parameter used to include extra information in the request. Options: "status_reason" and "cms_485_status"

exclude_medication_ids.name: exclude_medication_ids
exclude_medication_ids.description: Filter medications that do not contain specified id

status.name: status
status.description: Filter medications by status. Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_medication_status_setting"

frequency_setting.name: frequency_setting
frequency_setting.description: Filter medications by frequency. Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_frequency_setting"

administration_type.name: administration_type
administration_type.description: Filter medications by administration type. Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_administration_type_setting"

start_date.name: start_date
start_date.description: Filter medications by start datetime. Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss

end_date.name: end_date
end_date.description: Filter medications by end datetime. Format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss

discrepancy_type.name: discrepancy_type
discrepancy_type.description: Filter medications by discrepancy type. Options are the response of GET "/medication_settings/{branch_id}/medication_discrepancy_type_setting"

sort_order.name: sort_order
sort_order.description: Order in which the items should be sorted by. Ex: asc, desc

count.name: count
count.description: Max number of items to filter by
